title: Ability to change default status colour
excerpt:
Locking an extra grey column in every status column is really annoying.  If it cannot be removed, we should at least be able to change the colour!

posts.author: ApeyDave (Dave)
posts.cookedHtml:
Locking an extra grey column in every status column is really annoying. If it cannot be removed, we should at least be able to change the colour!

Logically, there’s no reason to mandate a grey column. Please let us change it.
